creator: _@thomaslevine.com
text:
Created attachment 170316
The patch

R version 3.2.2 is presently included in FreeBSD 10.3. The present patch upgrades R to 3.3.0. Most of the removed patch hunks are things that are now addressed upstream.

My computer
------------
I have tested this only on PC-BSD 10.3.

> uname -a
FreeBSD x220 10.3-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p1 #0: Thu May  5 14:48:00 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.pcbsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64


Related
------------
The present report might make irrelevant the following patch for an upgrade to version 3.2.3.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207673
